backend/main.mo: Defines core actor logic with user profiles, posts, comments, groups, reports, and media validation, including storage and authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Lists feature evidence entries mapping features to modified files, components, and related test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries of various frontend files for build planning.
frontend/index.css: Defines global Tailwind CSS variables and themes using an OKLCH color system for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point loading the main React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component handling routing, authentication state, profile setup gating, and page lazy loading.
frontend/src/components/FeedPostCard.tsx: Renders posts with media, likes, comments, and resolves usernames and avatars via profile lookups with error handling.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer displaying copyright, caffeine.ai attribution, and developer credit.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Navigation header with auth handling, dynamic menu items, and admin options using Internet Identity state.
frontend/src/components/PostComposer.tsx: Post creation form supporting text, images, videos, and documents with validation and preview handling.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal for creating a user profile with name, email, and academic details, submitting via mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages backend actors tied to Internet Identity and refreshes dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context and provider offering Internet Identity login, logout, persisted identity loading, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks wrapping backend operations for profiles, posts, feed, comments, and reactions.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS base and theme variables defining light and dark mode color tokens and global styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Implements a messaging UI letting users select contacts and send messages using backend hooks.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Displays the social feed with posts, likes, and comments, including loading state and sorted post rendering.
frontend/src/pages/ForumPage.tsx: Provides a Q&A forum interface with a dialog to create forum posts and a placeholder when no posts exist.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the homepage with platform features, hero section, and login integration via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/pages/ModerationPage.tsx: Shows moderation dashboards for viewing and updating reports, managing posts, and reviewing user data.
frontend/src/pages/StudyGroupsPage.tsx: Allows authenticated users to create study groups with validation and actor readiness checks.
frontend/src/utils/icErrors.ts: Parses various IC canister and agent error formats to return a readable message, falling back to generic text when needed.
frontend/src/utils/mediaGuards.ts: Provides helpers to validate media attachments, get direct URLs, check file types, and format file sizes for posts.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Handles reading, storing, and clearing URL and sessionStorage parameters, supporting both query and hash routing.
frontend/src/utils/userDisplay.ts: Generates user initials and provides a fallback label for unknown users.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining theme colors, animations, container settings, and plugins like typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Metadata describing project version, architecture, features, issues, and overall system state.
